_note: ZAO Trivia question bank. The /game/zao-trivia game picks 10 at random per round. Each question: q, options (4), answer (0-based index of the correct option), explain (one line shown after answering). Keep facts accurate to the ZAO ecosystem - this is the weekly Wednesday 11:30am EST live quiz where finishers split the pot. Add questions by appending to questions[]. No emojis, no em dashes.

questions.explain: ZABAL Gamez is The ZAO's free 3-month build event - June workshops, July open build, August Finals.

questions.q: What are the three ZABAL Gamez tracks?

questions.explain: Empire Builder is the community-layer framework - leaderboards, boosters, and rewards, token-based or tokenless.
POIDH - Pics Or It Didn't Happen - is an open bounty protocol on Base.

questions.q: What is Respect in the ZAO?
questions.explain: Respect is soulbound and non-transferable - governance weight earned through weekly contribution and peer consensus.

questions.q: What does WaveWarZ let artists do?
options: Earn from music battles, not streams
questions.explain: WaveWarZ flips the model - artists earn from music battles instead of streams.

questions.q: What is Bonfire in the ZAO ecosystem?
options: A shared AI memory / knowledge graph
questions.explain: Bonfire is a shared AI workspace where a group grows a collective, ownable memory - a knowledge graph.

questions.q: How long has the ZAO run weekly Respect sessions?
questions.explain: The ZAO has run weekly for 100+ weeks straight - that consistency is the foundation.

questions.q: What does Vini App let you do?
options: Build a real app from a plain-language prompt
questions.explain: Vini App lets anyone - even non-coders - build a real app from a plain prompt; it ships with a wallet and a token.

questions.q: When is the ZABAL Gamez open build month?
questions.explain: June is workshops, July is the open build, August is the Finals.

questions.q: What chain do ZABAL Gamez bounties and builds live on?
questions.explain: ZABAL Gamez runs on Base - POIDH bounties, Empire, and the Finals all settle there.

questions.q: What is a 'fractal' in the ZAO sense?
options: A way to make group decisions fair, fast, and fun
questions.explain: Fractals make community decisions fair, fast, and fun, using Respect from weekly contributions and peer consensus.

questions.q: What is the ZABAL Gamez August event called?
questions.explain: August is the Finals - a cohort curated from July, settled via the WaveWarZ-Base prediction market.

questions.q: What is the monthly prize on the ZAO 2048 game?
questions.explain: On /play, the top 10 each month win $Zabal.

questions.q: What is the ZAO's arcade call-to-action button?
questions.explain: Insert Coin is the ZABAL Gamez arcade mark and its sitewide CTA.
